title: ある意味アドバイスどおり……？

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller (?)
text_block_list.text:
You there... If you go beyond this point, you'll be
met with misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thanks for the advice! But the way I see it,
this is a lucky direction!

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller (?)
text_block_list.text:
No! Misfortune is sure to befall you! I'm warning
you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But feng shui says going this way is a great
idea! Let me through, please!

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller (?)
text_block_list.text:
I cannot! I have forty years of experience in this
field! You must believe me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is left exhausted after her
confrontation with the shady-looking fortune
teller...
